text:
lang/mono fails to build

How-To-Repeat: See the log file at https://gist.github.com/1342233/48e3cd3d0d728a84d044c27a87f18bdb44c38ba9 , with make.conf and the list of already installed packages (all installed from ports).

The error message is

Assembly ../../../class/lib/net_2_0/I18N.West.dll is delay-signed but not strongnamed
